Lead: City Council Meeting Rescheduled: The City Council meeting originally scheduled for June 30th is now rescheduled to July 1st at 7 PM. Editor context: This is a current change in the schedule of a city council meeting, which affects public participation and transparency. Suggested treatment: brief. Newsworthiness: 14/20 (immediacy 5, impact 3, conflict 2, novelty 4). Why now: The City Council meeting has been rescheduled to July 1st. Suggested next step: Verify the new date and time with official sources before drafting the story. What would make this publishable: Confirmation of the new date, time, and location from official sources.
